text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! Your application has been approved as a moderator. Please review the moderator guidelines and join the #moderators channel to get started.
Welcome guide_sam! Your application has been approved as an event_helper. Check out the #events channel and event planning resources to help organize community activities.
Welcome newbie_kim! Your membership has been approved. Please introduce yourself in #introductions and check out #getting-started for community guidelines and resources.
Welcome mentor_lina! Your application has been approved as a mentor. Join the #mentors channel to connect with other mentors and review the mentorship program guidelines.
